debug_info.goal:
R : Type u_1
S : Type u_2
inst✝² : CommRing R
inst✝¹ : CommRing S
T : Type u_3
inst✝ : CommRing T
g : S ≃+* T
f : R ≃+* S
⊢ ∀ (x y : R), g (f (x * y)) = g (f x) * g (f y)

failed_attempts:
intro x y
    simp [RingEquiv.map_mul, RingEquiv.map_mul]
    <;>

    simp_all [RingEquiv.map_mul]

intro x y
    have h₁ : f (x * y) = f x * f y := by
      apply f.map_mul
    
    have h₂ : g (f (x * y)) = g (f x * f y) := by
      rw [h₁]
    
    have h₃ : g (f x * f y) = g (f x) * g (f y) := by
      apply g.map_mul
    
    have h₄ : g (f (x * y)) = g (f x) * g (f y) := by
      rw [h₂, h₃]
    
    exact h₄

intro x y
    rw [f.map_mul, g.map_mul]

intro x y
    calc
      g (f (x * y)) = g (f x * f y) := by
        rw [f.map_mul]
      _ = g (f x) * g (f y) := by
        rw [g.map_mul]

intro x y
    calc
      g (f (x * y)) = g (f x * f y) := by rw [f.map_mul]
      _ = g (f x) * g (f y) := by rw [g.map_mul]

intro x y

        simp [f.map_mul]
      _ = g (f x) * g (f y) := by
        simp [g.map_mul]
      _ = g (f x) * g (f y) := rfl

intro x y
    simp [Function.comp_apply]
    <;> simp_all [Equiv.symm_apply_apply]
    <;> ring
    <;> simp_all [Equiv.symm_apply_apply]
    <;> rfl

intro x y
    have h₁ : f (x * y) = f x * f y := by
      -- Use the property of the ring equivalence f to preserve multiplication
      exact f.map_mul x y
    have h₂ : g (f (x * y)) = g (f x * f y) := by
      rw [h₁]
    have h₃ : g (f x * f y) = g (f x) * g (f y) := by
      -- Use the property of the ring equivalence g to preserve multiplication
      have h₄ : f x ∈ (Set.range f : Set S) := by
        use x
        <;> simp
      have h₅ : f y ∈ (Set.range f : Set S) := by
        use y
        <;> simp
      -- Since f is a ring equivalence, its range is the entire S
      -- Therefore, g can directly apply its multiplication-preserving property
      have h₆ : g (f x * f y) = g (f x) * g (f y) := by
        -- Use the property of the ring equivalence g to preserve multiplication
        exact g.map_mul (f x) (f y)
      exact h₆
    calc
      g (f (x * y)) = g (f x * f y) := by rw [h₂]
      _ = g (f x) * g (f y) := by rw [h₃]

intro x y
    simp [RingHom.map_mul]
    <;> simp_all [RingEquiv.coe_toFun]
    <;> simp_all [RingHom.map_mul]
₂

intro x y

simp_all [h₄, smul_zero]
            <;>
            aesop
          simp_all [h₃]
        exact Or.inl h₂
    · intro h
      cases h with
      | inl h =>
        -- If s = 0, then s • x = 0
        simp [h, zero_smul]
      | inr h =>
        -- If x = 0, then s • x = 0
        simp [h, smul_zero]
  exact h₁
